programme.title: Awol
programme.desc: An expert Army sniper armed with his tactical knowledge and deadly skills, goes on a quest to protect his family from the man who masterminded the attempt on his life and his loved ones.

programme.title: Kimmy Dora and the Temple Of Kiyeme
programme.desc: The adult twin daughters of an aging business mogul find themselves haunted by a terrifying ghost. The two dig into their family's past, and they travel to South Korea to try and find a way to appease the angry spirit.

programme.title: The Trial
programme.desc: A mentally challenged young man is accused of raping his teacher, and is then put through the machinations of a very public trial.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A young reporter's investigation into a string of grisly suicides takes a dangerous detour when she follows the clues to a cursed stretch of road.

programme.title: Hello, Universe!
programme.desc: Ariel, a middle-aged man full of regrets, gets another chance to rewrite his past when he meets a magical figure who gives him the life he has always dreamt of. But at what cost?

programme.title: Ikaw Pa Rin Ang Pipiliin Ko
programme.desc: Music gives her life. Music is his life. This is a story that will make our hearts skip a beat this season of love. Ikaw Pa Rin ang Pipiliin Ko, a May-December romance, promises the fresh tandem of Aga and Julia, who portray a musical conductor and chorister, respectively.

programme.desc: Five boys finds connection in each other while dealing with school, love and family problems.
